author: govinda dāsa
verses: āju śacī⋅nandana nava abhiṣeka ānanda⋅kanda nayana bhari dekha nityānanda advaita mili raṅge gā⋅ota unamata bhakatahiṁ saṅge hera⋅ite nirupama kāñcana⋅deha barikhaye sabahu nayana ghana⋅mehā puna puna nirakhite gora⋅mukha⋅indu uchalala prema⋅sudha⋅rasa⋅sindhu jaga bhari pūrala prema⋅taraṅge vañcita govinda⋅dāsa parasaṅge
en_translation:
Today is the new bathing ceremony of the Son of Śacī. Behold with your own eyes the very root of all bliss!

Nityānanda and Advaita together in joy sing with the ecstatic devotees.

Behold His unequaled golden body! All eyes shower tears like dense clouds.

Gazing again and again upon the moon-like face of Gaura, the ocean of the nectar of divine love overflows.

The entire world is filled with waves of divine love, but Govinda Dāsa remains deprived in this association.
